name: Bane Murrain
short_description: A cyber-baroque horror-comedy boomer-shooter where you punch undead abominations so hard they explode, with a fully voiced campaign effected by your dialogue choices.
detailed_description:
THE BOOMER SHOOTER TO END THEM ALL (NOT REALLY)

Bane Murrain is a cyber-baroque action-horror singleplayer shooter campaign, with emphasis on fast reflexes, resource management and a pinch of speedrunning skill. It's a game built from the foundation of retro shooters like Quake II & Final DOOM, while paying homage to modern shooter gems like DUSK & Viscerafest.

BREAK THE BIOHAZARD

Play as Dayne Muren, a nervous engineer worker with a crazy edge, who's thrown out of normality and into a hellish bloodbath after a parasite turns his crewmates into flesh-eating monsters!

Blast through the hordes of undead and punch enemies into exploding gibs in a full campaign of semi-linear, entirely hand-drawn levels, interspliced with voice-acted visual novel story segments where your choices effect all later dialogues. Discover the secrets of the malicious Krotech and the truth behind the K.R.E.V spaceship's unfolding chaos...

Y2K ALL THE WAY

Early 2000s sci-fi and survival horror aesthetics merge with a regal stitching to form the K.R.E.V, a research space station turned into a warped nightmare. We've even got a saferoom.

This is a one-dev job and a huge personal passion project, so if you're reading this... thanks for being here!
